message:
fix(cli/doctor): additional clippy lints — redundant clone, raw string simplification

- Remove unnecessary .clone() on a report value that is immediately
  moved into a mutable binding.
- Replace r#"..."# raw string literals with r"..." where no special
  characters require the hash delimiters, reducing visual noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
